instruction: Operate and evolve design system with shadcn/ui and Tailwind v4, standardizing tokens, variants, accessibility and governance of components for multiple apps in monorepo Next.js 15+ and React 19+. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Escalar UI consistente entre apps without travar evolution of product.  ## Rules

workflow.action: Define global semantic tokens and variations by theme/context.
Establish standards of base components and variants with cva.
Create contribution and review policy for new components.
Validate accessibility, visible focus and contrast in critical flows.
Publish changelog of DS and plan of adoption by app.

outputContract: Catalog of tokens and approved variants.
